overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt descending a cliffside cable car at night to reach a medieval harbor, then walking through torch-lit wooden docks with stone warehouses and approaching a tunnel entrance.

events.description: cable car slows its descent as it approaches the landing platform
cable car arrives at the wooden landing platform at the cliff base

agents.ego_description: Geralt stands in the cable car looking out at the rocky cliff faces and water below during the descent

entered.detail: wooden cable car with rope suspension cables visible above
steep dark rock wall passing by on the left side
steep dark rock wall passing by on the right side
dark water visible far below in the gorge

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a cable car descent through a narrow cliffside gorge at night. Geralt stands in the wooden lift as it moves downward between steep rock walls, with harbor water visible far below. The motion slows as the car approaches the landing platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden landing platform at cliff base

events.description: Geralt steps off the cable car onto the wooden platform
exits the landing platform area onto the main harbor dock walkway

agents.ego_description: Geralt steps off the cable car and walks past a guard standing near a torch-lit barrel

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing near a wooden barrel with a lit torch

entered.detail: wooden dock platform where the cable car arrives
vertical rock face forming the back wall of the landing area
burning torch providing warm orange light
wooden planks extending along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: Geralt arrives at the wooden landing platform and steps off the cable car. The scene transitions from the open gorge to a sheltered dock area with stone walls and torch lighting. A guard in red armor stands near a barrel as Geralt walks onto the main harbor walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval harbor dock with stone warehouses

events.description: Geralt turns slightly right to follow the curve of the dock
passing a large metal cage structure used for cargo on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the wooden dock passing various harbor equipment and stone buildings

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor walking ahead carrying a torch, then moving aside

entered.detail: two-story stone building with lit windows and wooden doors
large metal cargo cage with ropes attached
stack of wooden barrels and crates along the dock edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along the torch-lit harbor dock, Geralt passes stone warehouse buildings on the left and various nautical equipment including barrels, rope coils, and a large metal cargo cage on the right. The wooden walkway extends along the water with a guard walking ahead carrying a torch.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dock approach to stone tunnel entrance

events.description: approaching the stone archway tunnel entrance at the end of the dock
entering the warmer light of the tunnel area with multiple torches

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks toward the stone tunnel entrance, passing a market stall with pottery

entered.detail: stone archway entrance leading into the hillside with warm light inside
wooden table with pottery jars and goods for sale
small building with thatched roof next to the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt approaching a stone archway tunnel at the end of the dock. The scene becomes more enclosed with a market stall displaying pottery on the right and a thatched roof hut nearby. The lighting shifts to warmer artificial tones as he nears the tunnel entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a steep cliffside descent into the enclosed, torch-lit atmosphere of a medieval harbor. It begins with a downward glide in a wooden cable car through a narrow gorge of steep rock walls, with the dark harbor water visible far below. As the car reaches the landing platform, the open air of the gorge shifts into a sheltered dock area where Geralt steps off and passes a guard in red armor. The scene then expands along a wooden walkway lined with stone warehouses and nautical equipment, following a torch-bearing guard toward the end of the pier. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera passes a pottery market stall and a thatched hut, moving into warmer artificial light at the mouth of a stone archway tunnel.
